products.name: Arc Elegance
products.detail: The Arc Elegance floor lamp features a graceful curved design that extends light over seating areas without requiring ceiling installation. Finished in brushed brass with a marble base for stability, this statement piece includes an adjustable shade and dimmer switch. Perfect for creating ambient lighting in living rooms and reading corners.

products.name: Tripod Modern
products.detail: The Tripod Modern floor lamp combines mid-century aesthetics with contemporary functionality. Featuring three solid wood legs and a linen drum shade, this lamp provides warm diffused lighting. The adjustable height and stable tripod base make it versatile for various room configurations and design styles.

products.name: Reading Gooseneck
products.detail: The Reading Gooseneck floor lamp is designed for precision lighting with its flexible gooseneck arm and focused LED bulb. Features touch controls, stepless dimming, and three color temperature settings from warm to cool white. Energy-efficient LED technology and a slim profile make it ideal for home offices and reading nooks.

products.name: Torchiere Uplighter
products.detail: The Torchiere Uplighter floor lamp creates ambient room illumination by directing light toward the ceiling for soft reflection. Features a sleek metal column design with a frosted glass shade that diffuses light evenly. Includes a rotary dimmer for adjustable brightness and complements both traditional and contemporary interiors.

products.name: Tree Multi-Arm
products.detail: The Tree Multi-Arm floor lamp features five adjustable arms with individual LED bulbs, providing versatile lighting for large spaces. Each arm can be positioned independently to direct light where needed. Modern industrial design with a matte black finish and weighted base ensures stability while creating dramatic lighting effects.

products.name: Sculptural Statement
products.detail: The Sculptural Statement floor lamp doubles as functional art with its abstract geometric design and premium materials. Featuring a handcrafted metal frame with integrated LED strips, this lamp creates unique light patterns and shadows. A bold focal point that combines artistic expression with sophisticated lighting technology.
